      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas Kehninsch Sala-

jada Dehla Rohku/ tas nokawe
to/ ka wiꞥsch nomirre.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un us to Preesteri Abja-
tarn fazztja tas Kehninsch: Eij
us Anatotu us tawu Tihrumu/
jo tu eﬅti to Nahwi pelutis. Bet
es tewi schodeen ne nokauschu/
tapehz ka tu ta Kunga KUN-
GA Schkirstu preeksch manna
Tehwa Dahwida nefﬁs/ un ka
tu lihds apbehdihahts tappis ar
wiﬁn/kad mans Tehws apbehdi-
nahts tappe.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta iedﬁnne Salamans
Abjataru/ ka tas tam KUNGam
par Preesteri ne buhtu/ ka pee-
pilchts kluhtu ta KUNGÄ
Wahrds/ ko wiꞥsch pahr to
Nammu Eelus bij runnajs eekfch
Sihlus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Kad nu ﬁchi Slawa
preeksch Joaba nahze/ (Jo Joabs
bija pakkat Adoniju gahjis/ jep-
fchu ne pakkat Absalomu.) Tad
behdse Joabs us ta KUNGÄ
Telti/ un fativehre ta Altara
Raggus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 29,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tam Kehnixam Sa-
lamanxam tappe ﬂuddinahts/ ka
Joabs us ta KUNGÄ Telti
behdsis/ un raugi/ wiꞥsch irr pee
ta Altara. Tad fuhtija Sala-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 30,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un kad Benajus us
KUNGA Telti nahze/ tad f
zija wiꞥsch us to: Ta faﬂka t

zazzija: Ne/ bet es sche nom-
fchu. Tad gabje Benajus att
pee ta Kehnixa/ runnaja un f
zija: Ta irr Joabs runnajs/
ta irr wiꞥsch man atbildejs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 31,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas Kehninsch fazz-

to Affint atzemini/ ko Jo-
weltt irr islehjts.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 32,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta liks tas KUNG-
winna Affint us winna Gali-

irr kawis/ un ar Sohbinu-

wids to ne siunnaja/ Abneru-
ra Dehla/ Israëta Karra-
Kungu/un Amasiu Jetera Deh-
to Karra-Peel-Kungu no Jub-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 33,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta nahks winnu Aff-

"
